text:
First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPC_ACT_COMBINED_EVER Hepatitis C - acute - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
HEPC_CHR_COMBINED Hepatitis C - chronic - Combined Medicare & Medicaid Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
HEPC_CHR_MEDICAID Hepatitis C - chronic - Medicaid Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims
